header.closeFileTooltip: Close current file and stop monitoring

fileSelection.title: Welcome to LogViewer!
fileSelection.description: Select a log file to monitor in real-time. You can edit the file in any text editor, and changes will be reflected here automatically.

monitoringActive.title: Monitoring Active
monitoringActive.description: The file is being monitored for changes. Edit it in your text editor to see live updates.

noFileSelected.title: No file selected
noFileSelected.description: Please select a log file from the Home page to start monitoring.

histogram.title: Log Timeline
histogram.loadingMessage: Indexing is in progress — the chart will appear soon.

table.preparingLargeFile: Preparing the table for a large file. This may take some time.
table.emptyFiltered: No rows found for the selected filters.

server.reconnecting: No connection to the server. Reconnecting...

monitoringBanner.message: To monitor new lines, please re-select the same file.

refreshDisabledReason.monitoringRequired: File is not available for refresh. Select the file for monitoring.

monitoringReplace.withNames: You selected a different file ({{selectedName}}) instead of {{expectedName}}. IndexedDB data will be overwritten. Continue?
monitoringReplace.withoutNames: You selected a different file. IndexedDB data will be overwritten. Continue?

serverUpload.failed: Failed to upload file to server.

formatChange.confirmDefault: Are you sure you want to change the log format?
formatChange.confirmRemote: Changing the format will delete uploaded data on the server and re-upload the file. Are you sure you want to change the format?
formatChange.confirmIndexedDb: Changing the format will delete IndexedDB data and re-index the file. Are you sure you want to change the format?
formatChange.reloadFailed: Failed to reopen the file to change the format.
formatChange.changedUploadAgain: Format changed. Please upload the file to the server again.

unknownFormat.message: Log format for file {{fileName}} was not detected. Do you want to add a custom format?

customFormatDialog.title: Add Custom Log Format
customFormatDialog.registerError: Failed to register format. Check the regular expression.

filters.title: Filters
filters.unavailableUnknownFormat: Field-based filtering is unavailable for an unknown format.

supported.title: Supported Log Formats
supported.loadError: Failed to load supported log formats. Please check your connection or file location.

validation.missingNamedGroups: Use named capture groups, for example (?<timestamp>...) (?<level>...) (?<message>...).
validation.duplicateNamedGroups: Duplicate named capture groups: {{groups}}. Use unique names for each group.

hints.title: Regex tips
hints.namedGroups: Use named capture groups: (?<name>...). This is required for highlighting and filters.
hints.quick: Quick tips: \d{4} — year, \w+ — word, .+ — the rest of the line.

recommended.missing: No recommended fields detected yet. Add at least message and one time field for better analytics.

preview.title: Preview parsing of first 5 lines
preview.useNamedGroupsBody: Instead of regular groups () use named ones (?<name>...)
preview.duplicateGroupsBody: Each named group must have a unique name. Duplicates found:

pretrainedModels.title: Pretrained Models
pretrainedModels.description: Available backend models for anomaly detection.

items.formatDetectedHint: Click this field to change format

formatDialog.title: Select log format
formatDialog.description: Choose a format for correct parsing and displaying fields in the table.

anomaly.stoppedFull: Anomaly analysis was stopped by user.

detail.starting: Server is starting the analysis task.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The address may be incorrect, or the page was moved.

aboutPage.description: LuVo is a lightweight workspace for log viewing, chart-based analytics, and anomaly analysis with a focus on speed and clarity.
aboutPage.thesisAttribution: This project was completed as a master's thesis by Vladimir Efivov.

highlights.viewer: Open and inspect logs with filtering, search, and timeline tools.
highlights.monitoring: Track file updates in real time and keep the view synchronized.
highlights.charts: Explore dashboards and charts to understand trends and distributions in large log datasets.
highlights.anomaly: Run anomaly analysis with pretrained models to detect suspicious patterns.

thesis.supportLine1: This software was developed with the support of the Faculty of Information Technology, Czech Technical University in Prague.

dialog.title: Anomaly Analysis
dialog.settingsTooltip: These parameters are applied to anomaly calculation for the selected model.
dialog.thresholdTooltip: Lower value finds more anomalies, higher value is stricter.
dialog.stepSizeTooltip: Window shift between checks. Smaller is more detailed but slower.
dialog.minRegionTooltip: Minimum continuous anomaly block length to reduce noise.
dialog.profileSensitiveTooltip: High sensitivity: catches more anomalies, may include noise.
dialog.profileStrictTooltip: Strict mode: fewer false positives, stronger anomaly signal only.

disabled.indexing: Wait until data is loaded into the database.
disabled.noRows: No log rows to analyze. Load or attach a log file first.
disabled.prepareModel: Prepare selected model ({{model}}) in Pretrained Models first.

parameterLoad.critical: These parameters will significantly increase runtime: step {{stepSize}} yields roughly x{{multiplier}} checks compared to step 20.
parameterLoad.high: Current parameters noticeably increase runtime (roughly x{{multiplier}} checks compared to step 20).
parameterLoad.elevated: Current parameters increase runtime (roughly x{{multiplier}} checks compared to step 20).

dialog.resultNotification: Anomaly analysis completed. Anomalous rows found: {{count}}.

dashboard.title: Logs Dashboard
dashboard.selectFileDescription: No file is selected yet. Go to the upload page and choose a log file to open the dashboard.
dashboard.requiresServerUploadNotice: For large files, the dashboard is available only after uploading the file to the server. Go to View logs and click "Upload to server".
dashboard.noDataDescription: No data available yet for analytics.
dashboard.largeFilePreviewNotice: Large file mode: dashboard is based on file preview and can differ from the full-table view.
dashboard.largeFileFullScanNotice: Large file mode: all dashboard charts are calculated from the full file (timeline uses sampled points).
dashboard.noParsedWarning: Dashboard did not parse any lines. Add/update a matching log format to unlock analytics.
